## **2.2.2.C. PI #3**

### **What initiatives were implemented or are planned that will improve this PI and how does the NSA intend on monitoring their effectiveness on performance?**

There is no data to compare the indicator value for 2025.

The measures implemented to improve environmental performance are presented in section 2.2.1.(a).

Other improvements planned for RP4 are listed in the RP4 Performance Plan for Poland and are periodically updated in ERNIP.
